items.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

items.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
items.lead_paragraph: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

items.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

items.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
items.lead_paragraph: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

items.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI

items.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

items.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
items.lead_paragraph: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

items.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
